title: rubus hirtus subsp. glaucinellus
intro: Rubus hirtus subsp. glaucinellus, also known as the thorny raspberry, is a type of raspberry plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subsp. glaucinellus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and fruits can also be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, salves, and jams.
